name: AUTO-010 — Monday 07:00 Weekly Sprint Review

nodes.name: Write Report via API
nodes._note: n8n cannot write local files directly. The report content is pushed to ntfy and the API for review. To write the file, add a Code node that calls a file-write webhook or use the filesystem module if n8n has local access.

parameters.rawBody: =Sprint review for {{ $('Format Sprint Report').first().json.date }} ready. Hours saved: {{ $('Get Weekend Summary').first().json.executive_summary?.hours_saved_this_week || 0 }}h | Open risks: {{ $('Get Weekend Summary').first().json.executive_summary?.risks_detected || 0 }}

_hci_notes: AUTO-010 — Fires Monday 07:00. Pulls weekend-summary, formats as markdown sprint review, pushes ntfy alert. File write to reports/sprint/ requires either n8n filesystem access or a dedicated write-file endpoint.
